mnemonics: HAT for Agents: H uman-aware, A utonomous, T ask-oriented.
keyPoints: Intelligent Agents act autonomously on behalf of a user to achieve goals.
Supertools are powerful AI systems that amplify human capabilities, but the human remains in control.
The key design principle is to keep the human in the loop, ensuring AI assists rather than replaces.
commonMistakes: Confusing an autonomous agent (acts on your behalf) with a supertool (a tool you actively use).
Designing for full automation instead of human-AI collaboration, which can lead to a loss of user control and trust.
